## About us
We are an independent investment manager driven by a desire to create sustainable shared value by growing our clients’ retirement savings in an optimal and responsible manner.
[Who we are](https://mergence.co.za/#about-us) | [Our people](https://mergence.co.za/#about-us)
## How we invest
We have always maintained a pragmatic investing approach. In this, we acknowledge that the performance of different investment approaches or styles varies over time and our investment processes are therefore style-agnostic and geared to capturing prevailing opportunities consistently. Our investment strategies are underpinned by comprehensive, proprietary research and are long-term focused. Responsible investing and ESG principles are part of our ethos and embedded across our investment processes.
[ ![](https://mergence.co.za/) **CLICK** to play video ](https://mergence.co.za/#elementor-action%3Aaction%3Dpopup%3Aopen%26settings%3DeyJpZCI6IjIzMyIsInRvZ2dsZSI6ZmFsc2V9)
## Our funds
Our investments – both Public and Private Markets – span equity, multi-asset class, infrastructure, debt, and private equity funds.
[Public Markets](https://mergence.co.za/#our-funds) | [Private Markets](https://mergence.co.za/#our-funds)
## Making a difference
At Mergence we aim to make a difference in all that we do, in line with our belief of creating sustainable shared value. This ethos spans our investment decisions, the way we treat our people, the examples we set in leading the way, and our community outreach activities.
[Responsible Investor](https://mergence.co.za/#making-a-difference) | [Responsible Employer](https://mergence.co.za/#making-a-difference)
Connect with us or find your nearest office. Our operating hours are Monday to Friday, 8am to 5pm.
